notes: Does not load configuration tool (it's an option when you click "Play" in Steam). Crashes with gibberish text before anything actually loads.
title: Zanki Zero: Last Beginning

notes: Just don't run it in fullscreen mode. Borderless and window work however
title: Zanki Zero: Last Beginning

notes: the configuration tool can launch but the offset of the text and dropdown boxes is misaligned, however i'm unsure if this is an issue on windows as well. you have to launch the game with borderless or windowed mode (no window appears if you use fullscreen), but the game seems to work flawlessly after that.
title: Zanki Zero: Last Beginning

notes:
Played the game from start to finish with little to no issue. The game has issue when ran in full-screen. Use borderless if you want the same experience. 
The only time the game would act up is when the lightdm lockscreen activated, the game would result in a black screen of death.
Controller support was perfect
title: Zanki Zero: Last Beginning
